name: Marketo Engage
description: Marketo Engage — Adobes B2B marketing automation platform with email, web, push, mobile engagement, and ABM orchestration.

seo.title: Marketo Engage — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Marketo Engage: Marketo Engage — Adobes B2B marketing automation platform with email, web, push, mobile engagement, and ABM orchestration.

when_to_use: B2B ABM and lead nurturing automation with push and in-app engagement
Email, web, and mobile push orchestration for enterprise marketing automation
Behavioral scoring and triggered campaign sequences for B2B SaaS funnels
Adobe Experience Cloud integration for cross-channel B2B campaign management

pros: Proven enterprise B2B automation at scale
Tight ABM and CRM alignment with Adobe/Salesforce
Deep lead scoring and nurturing engines
cons: UI feels a decade old versus modern CDPs
Pricing and implementation cost are punishing
Mobile and push are bolt-ons, not native strengths
review.verdict: Heavy enterprise B2B automation — powerful for complex orgs, wrong tool if push and in-app are your priority.
review.best_for: Large B2B marketing teams running ABM and long nurture cycles
review.not_for: Product teams wanting modern push, in-app, and journeys

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
